programme.desc: After Cranky's exam, Bluster believes he is going to die soon, so he tries to act nicely in order to be remembered well.

programme.title: SONIC X Countdown to Chaos
programme.desc: Eggman takes Chris hostage after tricking Knuckles and Chris into giving him all six Chaos Emeralds discovered. Eggman and Sonic face off once more as Sonic seeks to save Chris and prevent Eggman from obtaining the final Emerald.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Donkey Kong, Diddy and Funky find a map and soon, everyone wants to get the implied treasure. They all go on a treasure hunt and fight to get it.

programme.title: SONIC X Chaos Control Freaks
programme.desc: While trying to retrieve the 7th Chaos Emerald from Dr. Eggman, Sonic and Friends are transported to the human world where Sonic is rescued by a boy named Chris.

programme.title: Who Gets the Dog?
programme.desc: A couple going through a divorce squabble over custody of their beloved dog.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin (Ice Cube) is a would-be entrepreneur with big plans...and running his family's barbershop isn't one of them. But when he impulsively sells the shop to a shady loan shark, he soon realizes just how important the neighborhood parlor is to him... and just how far he'll go to get it back!

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
programme.desc: Growing up in the Midwest in the early OOs, sixteen-year-old Alice has always been a good Catholic. But when an innocent AOL chat turns racy, she discovers masturbation and is overwhelmed with guilt. Seeking redemption, she attends a mysterious religious retreat to try and suppress her urges...

programme.title: I Want You Back
programme.desc: Peter and Emma thought they were on the precipice of life's biggest moments – marriage, kids, and houses in the suburbs – until their respective partners dumped them.

programme.title: My Christmas Inn
programme.desc: When business woman Jennifer is informed her parents are will be away for the holidays without her, she decides to leave her busy city life in San Francisco to visit her Grandma's Inn in Alaska that was left for her in order to fix-up and sell.

programme.title: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: When Anna, an unemployed painter, is unable to make ends meet, she is hired to become a personal Christmas shopper for Marc, an uptight corporate exec.

programme.title: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: Rene and Dennis try one last con in this crazy Christmas comedy starring Paul Rudd, Paul Giamatti and Sally Hawkins.

programme.title: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: After unexpectedly moving to Alaska, an ambitious doctor starts a new romance and learns that her small town is hiding a holiday secret.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: Three American paratroopers team up with resistance fighters in France to take on invading German army. Starring Corbin Allred and Jasen Wade (2012).

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers
programme.desc: (2003) War drama with Corbin Allred. After a Nazi ambush leaves them trapped behind enemy lines, a small band of soldiers discover a secret that could change the war - if they can make it out alive...

programme.title: Danger Close: The Battle Of Long Tan
programme.desc: (2019) War drama with Travis Fimmel. Outnumbered and outgunned, a band of 108 inexperienced Australian and New Zealand soldiers hold off 2,500 enemy troops during a downpour in Vietnam.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Hudson
programme.desc: After his mother's death, Hudson, a reclusive but charming man, embarks on a journey with his distant cousin to scatter his mother's ashes in the Hudson Valley region of New York.

programme.title: Arctic Void
programme.desc: When almost everyone vanishes from a tourist ship in the Arctic, a dark truth emerges that forces the three who remain to ally or perish.

programme.title: Into The Blue 2: The Reef
programme.desc: Free-spirited scuba divers Sebastion and Dani run a modest diving company in Hawaii. The young couple is delighted when they're hired by mysterious jet-setters who are searching for sunken treasure and will pay big money for diving help.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: The story begins with highly decorated Detectives Turk and Rooster of the NYPD facing a retirement which neither of them are ready for. Before they can hang up their badges, they are called to investigate the murder of a notorious pimp, who appears to have ties to a case they solved years before.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: As the Earth is on a collision course with a deadly asteroid after a small-scale meteor shower, a discredited astrophysicist and his team race against time to hack into a state-of-the-art meteor-tracking satellite. Can he save the world?

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: A shift in the Earth's polarity plunges the equatorial regions of the planet into an ice age of -459 degrees Fahrenheit a temperature so cold that energy and light doesn't exist.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: A publicity stunt press night held at a world famous scare attraction turns real when deep in the bowels of the London Tombs, a restless spirit has awoken. Evil, relentless and seemingly unstoppable, it hunts down the attendees.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: A group of surfers discover an old board game which claims a life every time it is played. To save their friends Jason and Erica must put themselves at ultimate risk to try and unwind the horrible chain of events they unwittingly set in motion.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: A rare book dealer, while seeking out the last two copies of a demon text, gets drawn into a conspiracy with supernatural overtones. Starring: Johnny Depp, Frank Langella, Lena Olin

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Two hardened criminals get into trouble with the US border patrol after meeting with a Mexican drug lord.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: A fledgling boxer tries to escape the shadow of his more famous but troubled older boxing brother.

programme.title: Me, Myself and Di
programme.desc: After winning the 'trip of a lifetime' to a caravan park in Rhyl, North Wales, unlucky in love Northerner, Janet Brown, is ready for a holiday romance. Unfortunately, following the advice of best friend Diana (Lucy Pinder) - that Janet should pretend to be the opposite of who she actually is in order to find love - doesn't quite lead to the happily ever after she was hoping for. A laugh-out-loud gritty rom-com with a huge ensemble cast including James Lance (Northern Soul, Bronson, Marie Antoinette, Bel Ami), Will Mellor (Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps, Line of Duty), Larry Lamb (EastEnders, The Hatton Garden Job), Marek Oravec (Captain America: The First Avenger), Wim Snape (The Full Monty, Coronation Street), and Katy Clayton (Casualty, Shameless).

programme.title: Horsemen of the Apocalypse
programme.desc: Seven college kids take a shortcut on their way to a party and unfortunately end up in Wormwood, where the spirit of the Headless Horseman hunts them one by one.

programme.title: It Follows
programme.desc: For 19-year-old Jay (Maika Monroe), the fall should be about school, boys and weekends out at the lake. But after a seemingly innocent sexual encounter, she finds herself plagued by strange visions and the inescapable sense that someone, or something, is following her. Faced with this burden, Jay and her teenage friends must find a way to escape the horrors that seem to be only a few steps behind.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During an extradition to South Korea, a group of dangerous criminals unite to stage a coordinated escape attempt from their floating prison. As the jailbreak escalates into a bloody riot, the fugitives and their allies from the outside exact a brutal terror campaign against the special agents onboard the cargo ship. But the prisoners aren't the only ones waiting to rise from the darkness.

programme.title: Don't Go
programme.desc: Between dreams and reality, lies a hidden truth in this mind-bending psychological thriller. Following the shock of their daughter's death, Ben (Stephen Dorff: Public Enemies) and Hazel (Melissa George: The Good Wife) move to a seaside village. But when their daughter begins appearing to Ben in a haunting recurring dream, he is convinced that she is trying to make contact from beyond the grave.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Starring Morgan Freeman and John Cusack comes a twisty, slick and intelligent crime thriller full of action, suspense mystery and intrigue. Cusack plays Ray Keene, a father who, during a hiking trip with his son in the wilderness, is suddenly forced into a dangerous rescue mission when a notorious assassin, Frank Cordell, washes downriver handcuffed to a dying US Marshall.

programme.title: The Working Girl
programme.desc: This slick, provocative thriller set in a more shadowy London, will have you nail-biting until its shocking climax. Cool and collected call girl, Virgine (Hafsia Herzi) has mastered the art of trading sex with wealthy businessmen for money, without getting emotionally involved. But when she meets mysterious Rupert (Ash Stymest), she becomes entangled in a deep and dangerous affair.

programme.title: The Furies
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. The Furies is Halloween meets The Hunger Games in this gripping & fast paced female-driven survival thriller. A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game. A game that can only have one winner.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Anything For Love
programme.desc: (2016) Romance with Erika Christensen. Katherine and Jack are paired by a dating service but their profiles are not entirely honest. Forced to come clean, will love still grow?

programme.title: Key to Love
programme.desc: A bookstore owner starts an antagonistic relationship with a book cover model until an antique key found in a false book unlocks their romance. Starring Corey Sevier (2023)

programme.title: Cupid
programme.desc: (2021) Magical romance with Richard Kind. Cupid is ready to hang up his bow, but when his hapless protégé Ruby is tasked with matching the 'unmatchable' Charlie, will she strike love or miss the mark?

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: (2017) Romance with Sara Rue. Novelist Jo must work with Navy Seal officer Colin for her next book. Will Colin put Jo through the wringer, or will cupids bow bring them together?

programme.title: Designed with Love
programme.desc: (2020) Romance with Kelly Van der Burg. A designer with no head for business meets a charming entrepreneur with no sense of style. Aren't they lucky that love, like a good outfit, is always in vogue?

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Celebrated and adored by millions, she was the Queen of people's hearts, yet the bittersweet story of the last man to truly capture hers has never before. In a story that until now has remained untold, Diana introduces a time in the Princess's life that was important in shaping her final years...

programme.title: Alone Together
programme.desc: Two strangers wind up double-booked in the same New York rental at the start of quarantine. Exasperating the situation, these polar opposites must learn to cope with each other's eccentricities, realizing they have more in common than meets the eye.

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans...

programme.title: Lust For Love
programme.desc: Astor's happy tenacity spoils his one chance at love with his lifelong crush Mila. Convinced he needs more experience with women to win her back, he engages her ex-best friend Cali to teach him how to woo women.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she's trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.title: Under the Greenwood Tree
programme.desc: A love story grows between local boy Dick Dewey and beautiful schoolteacher Fancy Day. But in seeking her hand in marriage penniless Dick finds himself in competition with other more likely suitors.

programme.title: Christmas Matchmakers
programme.desc: Two hard-working executive assistants arrange for their bosses to fall in love during the holidays.

programme.title: A Candlelit Christmas
programme.desc: Ellie, a perfume maker, travels back home for Christmas and help her dad with the business. Little does she know, that Logan is staying with him. As Ellie's attempts to learn about her family, Logan helps her realize that fairy tales do indeed exist!

programme.title: Christmas Mingle
programme.desc: A 30-something marketing executive with a top-notch career, killer wardrobe, dream apartment and great friends fills out a profile on a dating website hoping to find Mr. Right. However, her attempts at impressing her dream guy ends in disaster.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Plus One at an Amish Wedding
programme.desc: April Monroe is a superstar doctor at a big New York hospital, who has fallen head-over-heels for charming veterinarian Jesse, and their relationship seems to be heading in the right direction except for one thing: Jesse is completely tight-lipped about his Amish family.

programme.title: Surviving Love
programme.desc: Jessica Miller is thrust into the "real" world when she graduates from college. To conquer this new world, she must discover her faith, open a box of memories and learn the simple secrets of life only a mother can share.

programme.title: Murder in Mexico: The Bruce Beresford-Redman Story
programme.desc: A producer for the show Survivor, takes his wife and their children on vacation.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Durst's arrest captured headlines, but what about his forgotten first wife Kathie?

programme.title: Fighting for the Kids
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the Paralympic gold medalist and Olympic participant.

programme.title: Murder in Mexico: The Bruce Beresford-Redman Story
programme.desc: A producer for the show Survivor, takes his wife and their children on vacation.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki discovers that her client is actually a Voodoo priestess intent on resurrecting her dead brother.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki investigates what looks to be an evil imaginary friend, and discovers a child with telekinetic powers.

programme.title: Sister's Obsession, A
programme.desc: After Kendra's happy life starts to unravel, she soon discovers the cause is a vengeful long-lost twin sister.

programme.title: Lethal Beauty
programme.desc: A masseuse pays the price for being a good Samaritan when the young woman she helps turns out to be a killer.

programme.title: Love You to Death
programme.desc: A prosecutor must work on a case which reminds her of her childhood, when her mother was killed by her alcoholic father.

programme.title: Christmas At The Golden Dragon
programme.desc: When Romy and Rick's parents surprise them with the news that they will be closing the Chinese restaurant they have owned and operated for decades, the siblings each find themselves reevaluating their futures. Also impacted by the news are the landmark restaurant's loyal patrons and staff, who have all come to depend on the restaurant over the holidays.

programme.title: Christmas In Conway
programme.desc: Suzy is just home from the hospital and needs to be cared for around the clock. Her husband Duncan decides the best medicine Suzy could possibly have--and a Christmas present she'll never forget--is a ride on a real Ferris wheel set up in their own back yard. Why a Ferris wheel? Because it was while riding one many moons ago that Duncan asked Suzy to marry him.

programme.title: The Angel Tree
programme.desc: A writer seeks the identity of the person who helps grant wishes that are placed upon The Angel Tree, and in the process, reconnects with her childhood friend.

programme.title: The Christmas Edition
programme.desc: Up-and-coming journalist Jackie seizes the opportunity to run a small-town newspaper in Alaska and uses a series of Christmas articles to help the struggling business.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: Brother is pitted against brother in this tale of feuding ranchers in the Old West.

programme.title: Buddy Goes West
programme.desc: Two outlaws, "The Doctor" and the Indian Girolamo, help a village fight a gang and a corrupt sheriff who has discovered gold beneath the town.

programme.title: Guns Of The Revolution
programme.desc: In Mexico, a mad general is leading his own war against the Church.

programme.title: Wyatt Earp S01E13-16
programme.desc: In one of television's first adult Westerns, the famous marshal puts his life on the line to maintain order, first in Dodge City, Kan., then in Tombstone, Ariz.

programme.title: Nowhere To Go
programme.desc: In London, a Canadian serving prison time for grand theft escapes prison and attempts to retrieve his loot, kept in a bank safety deposit box, but his accomplice takes the security key while he only has the pass code.

programme.title: Eyewitness
programme.desc: A young woman unwittingly becomes a witness to a murder.

programme.title: Cage of Gold
programme.desc: Judith is dining with Alan, a young doctor, when a note is brought to her from Bill, a friend of her schoolgirl days. Alan proposes to Judith, begging her not to become entangled with Bill, but she rejects his proposal. She is swept into a whirlwind romance with Bill and marries him

programme.title: Horrors of the Black Museum
programme.desc: Bancroft, an evil crime journalist is hypnotising his assistant to commit murders for his own crime stories and delighting in the Yard's embarrassment

programme.title: Last Film
programme.desc: Afterward, "Sang-min" embarks on a journey with "Man-bok," experiencing events that blur the lines between dream and reality. The ultimate film they always wanted to create becomes their last reel.At a provincial university's film and theater department, Park Sang-min, who teaches film, is also a film director. Sang-min accumulated a significant amount of debt while making movies, eventually coming under threat from loan sharks. In the midst of this crisis, loan shark Man-bok approaches Sang-min and proposes a deal: if Sang-min makes a film about Man-bok's life, Man-bok will help him pay off his debt. Sang-min accepts the offer, and as they work

programme.title: Death Cab
programme.desc: A series of mysterious taxi murder incidents keep occurring, and rumors spread that all the victims are graduates from the same high school. The broadcasting club members from that very high school, Yeon-jeong, Jin-gi, and Yi-seon, decide to investigate the rumors themselves to uncover the truth. They plan to document their investigation process and upload it to become successful YouTubers with a million subscribers. One early morning, as they set out for their investigation, an enigmatic taxi appears before Yeon-jeong and her friends. What follows are horrifying moments of terror that unfold right before their eyes. The reckless teenagers find themselves facing a deadly reality as they capture the true nature of the murder taxi on their camera!

programme.title: Oh! Brothers
programme.desc: After the death of his father who had left the house and his family, his debt was inherited by Sang-woo who is unable to cope with the debt. So he finds another heir, a half-brother and his mother, to fend off the debt of his father.

programme.title: 26 Years
programme.desc: A gang member, an ex-national shooter, a policeman and a businessman who lost their family members during Gwangju Massacre in 1980 set an assassination plot against the ex-president who responsible, because he never apologise.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: I Think We're Alone Now
programme.desc: Del (Peter Dinklage) is alone in the world. Literally. After the human race is wiped out, he lives in a small, empty town, methodically going from house to house, collecting batteries and other useful items, and burying the dead...

programme.title: 400 Days
programme.desc: Four aspiring astronauts are sent on a simulated mission to a distant planet to test the psychological effects of deep space travel. Locked away for 400 days, the crew's mental state begins to deteriorate when they lose all communication with the outside world.

programme.title: Implanted
programme.desc: Sarah, a struggling young woman living in Brooklyn, agrees to volunteer as an experimental test subject for a company to be implanted with a nanochip in her cerebral cortex. When the implant turns sinister and orders her to commit crimes, Sarah has only one choice: to live or die.

programme.title: Christmas in the Air
programme.desc: Robert, a widower and father of two children, enlists Lydia to help him juggle his chaotic work-life balance at Christmastime. Will their close relationship lead to love? Stars Catherine Bell. (2017)

programme.title: A Very Country Christmas
programme.desc: (2017) Festive romance with Greyston Holt. A singer escapes the chaos of Hollywood to rediscover his love for country music. But what he stumbles upon is even better.

programme.title: Santa's Secret
programme.desc: (2014) Christmas romance starring Alicia Witt. A single mum rediscovers the magic of the season when unexpected love - and a surprising new job opportunity - come her way. Also starring Wallace Shawn.

programme.title: A Christmas Reunion
programme.desc: (2015) Romance starring Denise Richards and Patrick Muldoon. A high-flying executive inherits half of her aunt's bakery, but when she meets the co-owner, will it be a recipe for disaster or romance?

programme.title: Christmas On Holly Lane
programme.desc: (2018) Feel-good drama with Sarah Lancaster. Three lifelong friends reunite in a house filled with years of memories and make a plan to save the place that was so special to them through childhood.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: Liang Shan Po and the Millionaire
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Exorcism Of Emily Rose
programme.desc: A thrilling horror film about a lawyer (Linney), who takes on a negligent homicide case involving a priest (Wilkinson) who performed an exorcism on a young girl.

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: Parapsychologist Dr. Elise Rainier faces her most fearsome and personal haunting yet - in her own family home.

programme.title: Exorcist: The Beginning (2004)
programme.desc: Prequel. Exorcist: The Beginning traces the story of Father Merrin back to his first encounter with the Devil during his missionary work in Africa.

programme.title: Boogeyman 2 (2008)
programme.desc: A young woman with a life-long and phobic loathing of the boogeyman checks herself into a mental health clinic in the hope of finally facing her fears.

programme.title: The Good Lie
programme.desc: Orphaned during the Sudanese Civil War, a group of young refugees are given the opportunity to leave their camp and resettle in America.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: Permanent Midnight
programme.desc: Based on an allegedly true story of TV writer Jerry Stahl with a $5000 a week job and a $6000 a week cocaine habit.

programme.title: I Am Woman
programme.desc: The story of Helen Reddy, who in 1966 landed in NYC with her three-year-old daughter, a suitcase and $230 in her pocket. Within five years she was one of the biggest superstars of her time, and an icon of the 1970s feminist movement.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: The Siege
programme.desc: Walker, an international assassin, is compromised during a mission. His handler sends him to a Reassignment Center at which Walker will be processed for a new identity. During his stay at the facility, a ruthless assault team storms the compound searching for someone their boss has lost.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to prove his innocence, a skilled police negotiator accused of corruption and murder takes hostages in a government office to gain the time he needs to find the truth.
